scores.correctness_notes: Covers all gold standard fields (interface, limit, optional, scope) correctly. However, adds a 'role' field not present in the gold standard, and omits the important note that 'optional' should always be explicitly set (other than for peers), and the interface naming constraints (cannot be 'juju' or start with 'juju-', only a-z and -).
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'role' field is not present in the gold standard answer and appears to be fabricated or at least not part of the documented charmcraft.yaml relation endpoint specification.
